name: social-agent
description: Reddit → OpenAI → Threads + Instagram + Facebook autoposter with DALL-E images and web dashboard.

scripts.start:pm2: npm run build && pm2 start src/agent.js --name social-agent --restart-delay=5000
scripts.fetch: npm run build && node src/cli.js fetch
scripts.queue: npm run build && node src/cli.js queue
scripts.status: npm run build && node src/cli.js status
scripts.history: npm run build && node src/cli.js history
scripts.post-now: npm run build && node src/cli.js post-now
